case_title: JOHN PATRICK WARD VS. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARD, JOHN PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,500.00, COST ARE INCLUDED IN THE AWARD OF $3500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JOHN PATRICK WARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KAREN GOLDSTEIN (CLAIMS EXAMINER). WITNESS RODGER OCON (AUTO DAMAGE ADJUSTER) ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT TESTIFIED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF COMPLAINT. PARTIES STIPULATED ORALLY TO HAVE THEIR MATTER HEARD BY A PRO TEM JUDGE. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WARD, JOHN PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
